M1312_PRSR_ULCR_WDTH M1312 Largest Pressure Ulcer Width This field records the width of the same pressure ulcer; greatest width perpendicular to the length. CHAR 4 x
M1314_PRSR_ULCR_DEPTH M1314 Largest Pressure Ulcer Depth This field records the depth of the same pressure ulcer; from the visible surface to the deepest area. CHAR 4 x
